zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱，趋势承压调整
zh.content:
当前Solana价格在65.66美元附近波动，较20日均线66.70略低，显示价格短期承压。整体走势呈现轻微下行趋势，但跌幅有限，多空力量仍较为均衡，市场存在震荡整理的可能。  

MACD指标当前为0.1646，虽仍为正值但接近信号线，显示上涨动能减弱，买方压力逐渐下降。RSI数据缺失，但结合价格位置与均线，可推测短期超买风险有限，市场可能以回调或盘整为主。  

短期支撑位在65.50美元附近，若跌破该水平，可能触发进一步下探至65美元的心理关口。阻力位主要集中在66.70及67.50美元，若价格突破均线并稳住，有望恢复多头动能。  

交易上建议保持观望，短线可关注支撑位附近的低吸机会，同时设好止损控制风险。若价格回升突破均线并伴随MACD红柱扩张，可考虑小幅追涨，但应谨慎控制仓位，防止震荡行情带来的假突破风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading at 65.66, slightly lower on the day with a 0.45% decline, reflecting a cautious market tone after failing to sustain gains above the recent intraday high of 66.06. Price action remains mildly bearish in the short term, as the market is trading below the 20-period simple moving average at 66.70. This suggests that sellers currently hold a modest advantage, although the narrow daily range indicates limited downside momentum.

The moving average structure points to a weakening short-term trend, with the market struggling to regain bullish traction. At the same time, the MACD reading of 0.1646 remains in positive territory, indicating that underlying momentum has not fully turned negative. However, the absence of a signal-line reading limits confirmation strength, making it important for traders to watch whether momentum continues to fade or begins to recover during upcoming sessions.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near the session low of 65.51. A break below this area could expose additional downside pressure toward the psychological 65.00 level, where buyers may attempt to re-enter the market. On the upside, resistance is evident around 66.06, followed by the SMA(20) region near 66.70. A decisive move above these levels would improve the short-term outlook and could attract renewed buying interest.

Traders may consider maintaining a neutral-to-cautious stance while price remains below the 20-period moving average. Conservative participants may prefer to wait for a confirmed breakout above 66.70 before targeting higher levels, while short-term traders could monitor the 65.50 support zone for potential rebound opportunities. Risk management remains essential, as a breakdown below support would increase the probability of further corrective movement in the near term.
